info.title: Aspose.Slides.Converter
info.description: Aspose.Slides.Converter is a .NET Command Line Tool that allows you to convert PowerPoint presentations into multiple file formats. Optionally, the tool can be installed as a dependency in the .NET project to use it from source code.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: © Aspose Pty Ltd 2001-2024. All Rights Reserved.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds the tool features into the specified .NET project and allows to use them in source code.

options.name: --license
options.description: Path to the Aspose.Slides license file
